title: BRUSHING — Sara coaches anxious Eva
prompt: Wide shot in @bathroom — kid-friendly family bathroom with the oval mirror and double sink. @Sara on the LEFT step stool brushes confidently in big circles, mouth full of bright white foam. @Eva on the RIGHT step stool, smaller, copies the motion nervously — toothbrush wobbling, foam at the corners of her mouth, anxious eyes still flicking to the mirror. Both visible in reflection. Sara (cheerful, foam in her mouth): "Up! Down! AND in CIRCLES — easy-peasy!" Eva (foam, nervous): "Up… down… circles… okay." Sara (encouraging, holds up own toothy grin): "I was scared too last year. Now look — TWENTY clean ones!" Eva (tiny shaky smile starts): "…twenty?" Sound of running water and brushing — no music in audio track.
